Static ggplot map of labeled areas

Source: R/viz.R
ggmap_areas.Rd

Returns a ggplot2::ggplot map of labeled sf polygons overlaid on an rnaturalearth::ne_countries basemap, for embedding in pdf/docx Quarto output where interactive mapgl::mapgl maps do not render.

Usage

ggmap_areas(areas_sf, fill_color = "#3388ff", fill_alpha = 0.4)

Arguments

areas_sf

an sf object with a label column

fill_color

fill color for area polygons (default "#3388ff")

fill_alpha

fill alpha (default 0.4)

Value

a ggplot
